_meta.purpose: Curated intended decomposition constituents per concept — the oracle for the stated-extraction research loop (engine design §6.2). A candidate extractor is scored (precision/recall) against this set; iterate the boundary heuristic until it converges.
_meta.status: STARTER SEED — needs SME validation + expansion to ~20-50 concepts. C6135's entry now encodes DECISIONS D19/D20 (see below) and supersedes the design §4.2 worked example's single-valued R101/R105; morphology (op:Morphology) filler code is TBD (Medullary Carcinoma).
_meta.constituent_format: [axis, filler] — axis is an NCIt role code (e.g. R101) or an op: axis (e.g. op:Morphology); filler is an NCIt concept code. An axis MAY repeat: D19 preserves co-equal, non-nested fillers as relationship-group members rather than collapsing them to one leaf.
_meta.policy: R105 uses C36825, not C36761: the two are nested (C36825 rdfs:subClassOf+ C36761, verified in both the stated and inferred graphs), so most-specific selection applies (D15, scope-corrected by D19). C6135's five raw R101 candidates split across three axes per D20: the organ-level filler stays on R101; the lineage-generic fillers reached via the C3010 'Endocrine Neoplasm' ancestor move to op:AssociatedLineageClassification; the anatomic regions move to op:AssociatedRegion. None is dropped.

C6135.label: Stage III Thyroid Gland Medullary Carcinoma AJCC v7
